config.script:
try:
		Tabledata=self.view.params.rowData
		
		system.perspective.print("self.view.params.row " +str(self.view.params.row))
		system.perspective.print("Tabledata" +str(Tabledata))
		CreatedBy = self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
		CycleTime=Tabledata.get("CycleTime")
		MST_Line_Id=Tabledata.get("MST_Line_Id")
		MSTCycleTimeId=Tabledata.get("MSTCycleTimeId")
		ShiftID=Tabledata.get("ShiftID")
		MST_WorkStation_Id=Tabledata.get("MST_WorkStation_Id")
		WorkStationName=Tabledata.get("WorkStationName")
		GroupId=Tabledata.get("GroupId")
		system.perspective.print("MSTCycleTimeId " +str(MSTCycleTimeId))
		
		params = {"MST_Line_Id":MST_Line_Id,"GroupID":GroupId,"ShiftID":ShiftID,"MST_WorkStation_Id":MST_WorkStation_Id,"CycleTime":CycleTime,"CreatedBy":CreatedBy,"MSTCycleTimeId":MSTCycleTimeId}
		system.perspective.print("params" +str(params))
		result = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/CycleTimeConfiguration/AddUpdateCycleTime",params)
		
		result=str(result)
		system.perspective.print("result cycle time " +str(result))
		if(result!='1'):
			message = str(result)
			state = "warning"
		elif(result=='1'):
			message = "Cycle Time added successfully."
			state = "success"
			
		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")		
		system.perspective.sendMessage("CycleTimeTableRefresh", scope = "page")
	except:
		screenName ='CycleTime'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/CycleTimeConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onActionPerformed  ->cntSave/btn_Save')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())

try:
		Tabledata=self.view.params.rowData
		CreatedBy = self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
#		CycleTime=Tabledata.get("CycleTime")
#		MST_Line_Id=Tabledata.get("MST_Line_Id")
#		MSTCycleTimeId=Tabledata.get("MSTCycleTimeId")
#		ShiftID=Tabledata.get("ShiftID")
#		MST_WorkStation_Id=Tabledata.get("MST_WorkStation_Id")
#		WorkStationName=Tabledata.get("WorkStationName")
#		GroupId=Tabledata.get("GroupId")
#		system.perspective.print("MSTCycleTimeId " +str(MSTCycleTimeId))
		dtSet=self.session.custom.dsCycleTime
		result=0
		for i in range(len(dtSet)):
			if i > 0:			
				MSTCycleTimeId=dtSet[i]['MSTCycleTimeId']
				MST_Line_Id=dtSet[i]['MST_Line_Id']
				MSTCycleTimeId=dtSet[i]['MSTCycleTimeId']
				ShiftID=dtSet[i]['ShiftID']
				GroupId=dtSet[i]['GroupId']				
				MST_WorkStation_Id=dtSet[i]['MST_WorkStation_Id']
				CycleTime=dtSet[i]['CycleTime']
				params = {"MST_Line_Id":MST_Line_Id,"GroupID":GroupId,"ShiftID":ShiftID,"MST_WorkStation_Id":MST_WorkStation_Id,"CycleTime":CycleTime,"CreatedBy":CreatedBy,"MSTCycleTimeId":MSTCycleTimeId}
				system.perspective.print("params" +str(params))
				result = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/CycleTimeConfiguration/AddUpdateCycleTime",params)
		
		result=str(result)
		system.perspective.print("result cycle time " +str(result))
		if(result!='1'):
			message = str(result)
			state = "warning"
		elif(result=='1'):
			message = "Cycle Time added successfully."
			state = "success"
			
		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")		
		system.perspective.sendMessage("CycleTimeTableRefresh", scope = "page")
	except:
		screenName ='CycleTime'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/CycleTimeConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onActionPerformed  ->cntSave/btn_Save')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())
